title: qRT-PCR for Zebrafish Brain Tissue
author: Robin Zhang
materials: Reagents: RNA Extraction Kit (QIAGEN, 74034), RT-PCR Kit (Thermo, Ref 4374966), qPCR Kit(Promega, USA, A6002)
Equipments: Centrifuge, Nanodrop, Thermocycler, qPCR Machine and consumables
Export Ct values and perform quality control

steps.title: Prepare Buffer RLT Plus supplemented with...
steps.instruction: Prepare Buffer RLT Plus supplemented with β-mercaptoethanol by adding 10 µL β-mercaptoethanol per 1 mL Buffer RLT Plus . Keep all samples and RNA-containing solutions on ice where possible, and use RNase-free tubes, tips, and reagents throughout the procedure.

steps.title: Using the sample with lowest concentration...
steps.instruction: Using the sample with lowest concentration to determine the total amount of RNA as input

steps.title: This protocol describes the workflow for...
steps.instruction: This protocol describes the workflow for qRT-PCR-based gene expression analysis from animal tissues, including brief sample collection, RNA extraction, cDNA synthesis, qPCR setup, and ΔCt/ΔΔCt-based data analysis. The procedure was primarily used for zebrafish larval tissues, especially dissected eyes and brains. For other animal tissues, the same downstream workflow can be followed after appropriate tissue disruption and homogenisation.

steps.title: Dissect zebrafish larval brain tissue and...
steps.instruction: Dissect zebrafish larval brain tissue and immediately freeze the tissue on dry ice if extraction is not performed immediately.

steps.title: Add 700 µL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy MinElute column
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy MinElute column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 s at 12,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 s at 12,000 rpm and discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Transfer the ethanol-containing mixture to an...
steps.instruction: Transfer the ethanol-containing mixture to an RNeasy MinElute spin column placed in a collection tube.

steps.title: Add 350 µL 70% ethanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL 70% ethanol to the flow-through and mix well by pipetting. Do not centrifuge at this stage.

steps.title: Keep the flow-through and discard the gDNA Eliminator spin column
steps.instruction: Keep the flow-through and discard the gDNA Eliminator spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 30 s at 12,000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 30 s at 12,000 rpm .

steps.title: Carefully transfer the cleared supernatant to...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the cleared supernatant to a gDNA Eliminator spin column placed in a collection tube. Avoid disturbing or transferring any pellet material.

steps.title: Centrifuge the lysate for 3 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the lysate for 3 min at full speed to pellet debris.

steps.title: Homogenise the tissue thoroughly using a...
steps.instruction: Homogenise the tissue thoroughly using a 20-gauge needle and an RNase-free syringe . Pass the lysate through the needle multiple times until the tissue is fully disrupted and the lysate appears homogeneous.

steps.title: Add 350 µL Buffer RLT Plus...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL Buffer RLT Plus supplemented with β-mercaptoethanol to each sample.

steps.title: If the homogenised lysate has been...
steps.instruction: If the homogenised lysate has been frozen, thaw the sample thoroughly using a water bath or metal bath for approximately 1 min 30 s before continuing with RNA extraction.

steps.title: Add 500 µL 80% ethanol to the column
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL 80% ethanol to the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 s at 12,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 s at 12,000 rpm and discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE to the column
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE to the column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 s at 12,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 s at 12,000 rpm and discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Place the RNeasy MinElute column into a new RNase-free 1
steps.instruction: Place the RNeasy MinElute column into a new RNase-free 1.5 mL collection tube .

steps.title: Centrifuge the column for 5–6 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the column for 5–6 min at full speed to dry the membrane completely.

steps.title: Discard the collection tube and place...
steps.instruction: Discard the collection tube and place the RNeasy MinElute column into a new collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 2 min at 12,000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 2 min at 12,000 rpm .

steps.title: Store purified RNA on ice for...
steps.instruction: Store purified RNA on ice for immediate reverse transcription, or at −80°C for longer-term storage.

steps.title: Centrifuge to elute RNA
steps.instruction: Centrifuge to elute RNA. Record the final RNA concentration and purity after elution.

steps.title: Add 14 µL RNase-free water directly...
steps.instruction: Add 14 µL RNase-free water directly to the centre of the membrane.

steps.title: Load and run the qPCR plate, follow the kit protocol
steps.instruction: Load and run the qPCR plate, follow the kit protocol

steps.title: After the reaction, DO NOT TEST...
steps.instruction: After the reaction, DO NOT TEST CONCENTRATION OF RTPCR PRODUCT, STAIGHT TO QPCR

steps.title: Following the system as kit suggests,...
steps.instruction: Following the system as kit suggests, and keeping the whole process on ICE !!!

steps.title: Before setting up the qPCR reaction,...
steps.instruction: Before setting up the qPCR reaction, plan a plate layout in Excel or the qPCR machine software. Each biological sample should be analysed with both the target gene primers and the housekeeping gene primers. Technical triplicates are normally used for each sample-primer combination.

steps.title: Typical 96-well Plate Design
steps.instruction: Typical 96-well Plate Design: Replica 1 Replica 2 Replica 3 NTC NTC NTC

steps.title: Prepare qPCR reaction mix
steps.instruction: Prepare qPCR reaction mix

steps.title: Perform statistical analysis
steps.instruction: Perform statistical analysis

steps.title: Calculate ΔΔCt and relative expression
steps.instruction: Calculate ΔΔCt and relative expression

steps.title: Calculate ΔCt values
steps.instruction: Calculate ΔCt values
